narrative:
Twinsburg 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 803 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.6 percentage points.
